nonBlockingIssues.description: sys_channel_create_model and sys_channel_create_fixed are functionally identical after the model was updated — dead code duplication in the test file
No test coverage for the shared_pages() failure path (kernel syscall.rs lines 268-274)
unmap_channel_page does not bounds-check that 'va' falls within [CHANNEL_SHM_BASE, CHANNEL_SHM_END); safe in practice but a debug_assert would prevent misuse from new call sites
unmap_channel_page callers don't issue TLB invalidation — correct because target process hasn't started, but a comment explaining why would prevent future confusion
unmap_channel_page doc comment only mentions handle_send but is now also called by sys_channel_create — should be updated to reflect both call sites
HandleError::TableFull is returned when map_channel_page fails (address space exhaustion), not a handle table issue — pre-existing naming mismatch

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Acknowledge model-based TDD as the standard approach for kernel logic that can't be imported on the host. All 3 bug fix features independently converged on the same pattern: separate buggy/fixed model functions that mirror kernel logic. The skill should document this as the expected approach, and note that once the model is updated to match the fix, the separate 'fixed' model becomes redundant and should be removed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: channel_create_leak.rs, sched_context_create_leak.rs, and handle_send_rollback.rs all use dual buggy/fixed model functions. Workers in sessions 50d9a1e3, 768cda4e, and 19252691 each independently adopted this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'Special Cases' section for verification-only gate features that only need test suite + build verification, not file audits or bug category checklists. This prevents workers from wasting time on inapplicable audit steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: bugfix-regression-gate worker (session a1b0f343) correctly skipped audit steps but flagged uncertainty in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the cross-feature discovery pattern: when fixing a rollback bug in one syscall, check all sibling syscalls for the same pattern. In this milestone, fixing handle_send rollback (d9a32a2) revealed an identical PTE leak in sys_channel_create, which required a follow-up fix (9d83ab7).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-handle-send-rollback handoff discoveredIssues[0] describes sys_channel_create PTE leak. fix-channel-create-pte-leak was created as a direct follow-up.
